open_positions.name: Extreme Networks
open_positions.thesis: Sympathy selling off CALX print - both are networking/access equipment names. EXTR down 5.8% on 3x volume with no company-specific news in feed, while XLK is up 2.2%, strongly suggests read-through trade. Catalyst: CALX -14% print dragging networking peers. Falsified by: Discovery of EXTR-specific negative catalyst (pre-announce, lost deal, downgrade) would validate the move; continued sector-wide weakness would suggest broader enterprise IT spend concern.
open_positions.latest_reasoning: Entry yesterday was on a sympathy-selling read: CALX -14% on earnings miss, EXTR down 5.8% on 3x volume with no EXTR-specific news. XLK up 2.2% that same day rules out broad sector weakness. Still 1 day old; thesis (read-through trade, mean reversion expected within days) has not had time to play out or be falsified. No EXTR-specific negative news discovered in feed. Position is only 1.7% of portfolio, well under position and sector limits. The downside risk is that CALX's miss reflects genuine enterprise IT spend weakness that EXTR will face at next earnings or guidance—that would break the thesis. Until that evidence surfaces, holding is consistent with the original conviction. If thesis breaks, will see either EXTR pre-announce, lost deal, or broad networking-sector capitulation; none yet in evidence.

trade_log.why: Opened per flag: LIKELY OVERDONE conf 3 — CALX -14% print dragging networking peers
